positive: A minimalist, vector-art illustration of a majestic mountain landscape at sunrise. The composition should feature sharply defined, clean silhouettes of towering peaks and sweeping foothills against a dramatic, gradient sky. Incorporate stylized elements like stylized flora (pine trees, wildflowers) clustered at the base of the mountains. The overall style should be clean, modern, and high-contrast, utilizing limited colors (deep indigo, warm gold, muted teal). The perspective should be frontal and balanced, perfect for central placement on apparel. Utilize negative space effectively to create a clean, adaptable print.
